Transformation Notes:
[Manifestation] rdamd:P30137 ["indicator 1 label: " + {$a} + "according to: " + {$b} + ("applies to " + {$3}).
If the first indicator is 8, lable is the same as # - Audience

I do not think it is appropriate to use "has intended audience of manifestation" (unstructured description) because the semantics imply intention (by the publisher or producer), and the example data indicate that the values are cataloguer judgement about the audience, not the intention.--Gordon
